title: zapoteca cruzii
intro: Zapoteca cruzii, also known as Cruz's Zapoteca, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Mexican folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Zapoteca cruzii are believed to include the treatment of gastrointestinal issues, fever reduction, and wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures.
